programme.desc: Aja says she is tired of caring for her entitled, drug-addicted mother, Janet, by allowing her to live with her for 8 of 10 years of her own marriage. Aja cites costs of $100,000. Janet rejects: she pays rent & regularly goes to Narcotics Anonymous.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.desc: Malcolm and Eddie meet the girl of their dream, only to find that it's the same woman.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred, Grady and Bubba become television game show contestants on 'Wheel and Deal' to try and win a birthday present for Lamont.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: With the money that Lamont was going to use to repair the junk truck, Fred buys half ownership of professional boxer Junior Joe Louis -- a three-hundred pounder who eats better than he fights.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred can't wait for his sister to come for a visit and introduce her new husband -- but that's before he finds out the groom (guest star Allen Drake) is white.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: When a doctor can't find any physical reason for Lamont's headaches, he determines it must be psychological and sends him to a psychiatrist. But the shrink discovers that the answer lies not in Lamont, but in his father.

programme.desc: Kat talks terms with Nessie for her guest spot and is surprised by a former employee pop-up during a high-end client tattoo. Nessie throws Vudu a 30th birthday celebration. Lemeir breaks difficult news about the shop to Barbie and Ken.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles

programme.desc: KP debates with the IAM team whether or not to attend Ceaser's opp-filled event, while Kat and Enigma prep art pieces to adorn the gallery walls. Lemeir looks to get back into the tattoo game and hopes that Ceaser's event is the perfect place to network.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: In the season premiere, the crew celebrates 10 years of Black Ink. The first ever Black Ink graduation ceremony goes left when Ceaser realizes that not everyone deserves to be head of the class.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: Spyder worries that his first pop-up shop will be a flop as Tatti looks to Krystal and Bae for advice on a special assignment. The Black Ink Bosses finally reunite after their heated confrontation.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: Ceaser makes a public announcement about changes at the shop that could have a chilling effect on Rok and Krystal. Tatti gets a cold lesson in humility from Bae while deciding to take some personal matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: Change is in the air at Black Ink as Ceaser introduces some new blood to the crew. Rok and Krystal consider their future at Black Ink as Bux opens up to bring awareness to others with his lifelong battle.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when the 125th artists merge with the Brooklyn shop. A startling revelation about Rok causes Ted and Puma to panic. Bux makes the situation with Spyder worse. Ceaser announces an out-of-town trip and Tatti goes MIA.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: The crew heads to Orlando for Black Ink boot camp where Ceaser is ready to see who is really there for Black Ink. Everyone gets put to the test as tensions arise when Bux and Spyder air their unfinished business at dinner.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: The crew is left in disarray after the bar fight. Ceaser and the bosses wonder what this means for the future of Black Ink, while Rok and Krystal's plans to open a Black Ink New Jersey come to a screeching halt.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: While Ted and Puma address the fallout from Orlando, Tatti starts her new life post Black Ink. Bae attempts to make amends with Krystal as Rok decides whether he's more loyal to Krystal or Black Ink.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper
programme.desc: Mark and Vanessa make a bet on who can go the longest without telling a lie.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un ciclista atropellado por un automóvil que se dio a la fuga, Gibbs se prepara para testificar en contra de un asesor financiero quien le robó millones de dólares a la Fuerza Naval.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS rastrea una computadora que le fue robada al vecino de Gibbs, Phineas (Jack Fisher).

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando los miembros de un Equipo de Entrenamiento de Capacidades de Acción Regional (REACT) del NCIS mueren durante una explosión, la agente especial del NCIS Jessica Knight, ayuda a resolver el caso utilizando una armadura de alta tecnología.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras siguen a un traficante de armas, el equipo se sorprende cuando Bishop se ve implicado en una antigua filtración de la NSA.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Arreglos secretos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un profesor universitario involucrado en un programa de becas cuestionable. Mientras, Danny descubre que su padre ocultó que el fiscal del distrito lo investiga por ética y procedimientos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Batallas de custodia
programme.desc: Erin investiga el caso de un policía acusado de matar a un sospechoso detenido. Frank le aconseja ceñirse a los hechos para evitar un escándalo. Mientras, Jamie insta a Eddie a perdonarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Más allá de todo
programme.desc: Un detective del distrito de Danny es asesinado mientras trabajaba encubierto. Frank busca al asesino, pero descubre un gran secreto del fallecido. Mientras, Jamie y Eddie ayudan a Nicky a encontrar a un excompañero de clase.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Exilio
programme.desc: Cuando Danny es asignado a servicio modificado tras investigar un caso prohibido, se da cuenta de que tropezó con algo secreto. Al pasarle la pista a su padre, Frank se alarma.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man's pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous pursuit between Officers and a known meth dealer ends in an arrest. A suspect with several felony warrants is apprehended without incident. A pursuit involving a stolen motorcycle exceeds speeds of 100mph.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he's caught burglarizing property in the area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a wealthy couple who are found outside their home, which was up for sale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom suspects murder when the body of a dwarf is found hanging from a rope high above a stage in a casino hotel where a convention of little people is being held.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Sara investigate when a woman vanishes while taking part in a magician's act.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Catherine helped put a man on death row for the rape and murder of a coed at a nearby college. The man is about to be executed when he's granted a stay based on new DNA evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A boxing champ dies in the ring after taking a brutal beating from his nemesis, but Grissom finds evidence that points to murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is called in by a pornographic-film developer to view graphic footage from a snuff movie in which a woman is brutally slain.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A cab driver seems to run over a boy and is then beaten to death by a mob for racial reasons.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Nick investigate the case of a man who apparently was murdered and pushed off a six-story building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the grisly meat grinder murder at a slaughterhouse.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Some bird watchers find a raven with a human eyeball in its mouth. Warrick and Grissom look into the circumstances of David's unusual and first autopsy.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick investigates the drive by murder of a young girl in his old neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine takes the point in the investigation of an escalating series of peeping tom incidents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick and Grissom investigate the death of a man found at a foam party.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: U+000AUna noche llena de celebración termina con una explosión cuando el director de una fundación de becas para sordos es asesinado por un mortal coche bomba, lo que llevó a Sara a interrogar a los estudiantes y profesores de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una donación de segunda mano se vuelve espantosa cuando se encuentra un cadáver en una caja. Mientras tanto, la esposa de Langston hace una visita sorpresa al laboratorio criminalístico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifica contra el famoso asesino de 'Dick y Jane', Nate Haskell. Mientras tanto, Nick recibe una llamada de un adolescente con problemas, Jason McCann, para advertirle del peligro inminente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo CSI está en alerta zombi cuando dos hombres inicialmente declarados muertos misteriosamente vuelven a la vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ex policía convicto, el equipo de CSI se topa con una lista en su celda de la prisión con los nombres de varias personas que creía que podrían haber sido el verdadero asesino de su esposa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una serie de muertes instigan una apuesta entre el equipo de CSI en cuanto a si han "golpeado para el ciclo," un homicidio, un suicidio, un accidente y una muerte natural en una sola noche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Sara se dirigen a Lady Heather en busca de ayuda para localizar al culpable responsable de herir a una mujer antes de que aparentemente fuera mutilada hasta la muerte por un león de montaña.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de su fuga, Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane", reaparece cuando envía por correo electrónico un inquietante video de amenaza de muerte al padre de una de sus novias.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston se vuelve más decidido que nunca a localizar a Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane," después de descubrir que ha secuestrado a su ex esposa, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de años de persecución y un sinnúmero de asesinatos, Langston se encuentra cara a cara con el asesino en serie, Nate Haskell, dentro de la casa donde comenzó su juerga de asesinatos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Múltiples tiroteos y apuñalamientos en un tranvía público dejan al equipo de CSI con un testigo y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tres sospechosos se presentan con tres razones diferentes por las que mataron a toda una familia y el equipo de CSI tiene que determinar quién dice la verdad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante una cita,Stokes se da cuenta de que una obra de arte en una exhibición tiene partes del cuerpo en descomposición,lo que lleva a una investigación en toda regla.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El exalcalde de Las Vegas recibe un disparo en el Museo de la Mafia y el equipo de CSI se embarca en una lección de historia en busca de pistas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team face off with Miami’s notorious and deadly Mala Noche gang after a funeral becomes the scene of a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A family boating accident reveals a sinister plot by grifters to heist 10 million dollars in gold bars. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a teenage girl partying in Miami on her way to the Bahamas with her high school class.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young man faces life in prison – and possibly worse – unless Horatio can prove his innocence against insurmountable odds.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team race against time to find out who is trying to frame Horatio for the murder of a woman he’s been dating.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a "wives weekend" ends in murder, the CSI team is faced with three women whose separate trysts with the victim make them prime suspects

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team works in tandem with NY CSI chief Mac Taylor to apprehend a serial killer before he kills the young girl he has just taken hostage

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI desentrañan el complicado misterio de un asesinato en un lugar de trabajo cuando encuentran a una odiada recepcionista asesinada en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Horatio Caine, Kyle, regresa de la guerra, busca la ayuda de su padre y del equipo de CSI para resolver un inquietante asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Las vacaciones de primavera elevan la cantidad de muertos en Miami cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se separan para resolver tres asesinatos diferentes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas aparentemente perfecto termina en asesinato y, cuando se roban pruebas del lugar del crimen del laboratorio, Delko regresa para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el asesino de la esposa de Horatio se fuga de la cárcel y causa disturbios, deben determinar qué es lo que busca y encontrarlo antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una estrella de telerrealidad, el equipo de CSI investiga al elenco, a los admiradores obsesionados y el pasado oculto de las estrellas para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre afirma haber soñado con un asesinato antes de que sucediera, Horatio debe enviar a Natalia de incógnito para que el equipo determine la verdad.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.desc: We’ve got so much paternity action we can’t fit it all in one show. “You Are the Father” could be the sweetest words these men could ever hear. Will the results be make our guest cheer or tear?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Take the Test ... Did You Cheat?
programme.desc: These women are at their wit's end because they suspect their lovers of infidelity. These men swear that they’re just crazy or jealous, but Maury’s got the lie detector results!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Rhonda is positive that John is the father of her child. Even John’s mother agrees with her! Then, Kim and Heather used to be best friends. But that was before Rick left her for Heather. But Kim is sure that Rick fathered her baby. What is the truth?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Charlotte and Tasheun bonded over their children’s mutual father from a photo album, Brandon, but will the DNA test further confirm this? Then, will Tanya prove that her baby Craig III is the son of Craig Jr.?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Almeta must know why her best friend is so close with her fiancé. Brandon must convince his fiancée and mom that he's no cheater! Jennell canceled her wedding because she thinks her fiancé is unfaithful, but her sister has a shocking secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Josh is furious that his girlfriend Kathryn may be cheating on him… with his brother! Shandi thinks her boyfriend is living a second life with a secret family. Will Nikita cancel her nuptials to Patrick after she watches the hidden camera video?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Why don’t 21-year-old Q and 55-year-old Alicia have sex more often? Then, Jenny fell for a man 10 years her junior and has been finding pictures of naked women on his phone but has he been cheating?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shenik and Shenequa were united on Maury’s show last year after a DNA test. But now is Shenik sleeping with her sister’s man? Plus, the only thing that stands in the way of these couples tying the knot are their lie detector test results!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Rachelle believes that her man Chris may be cheating with as many as 50 women, including her sister! Then, Carrie was shocked when she found out that her man Chris lied about his military service.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Two years ago Chelsea admitted that she was secretly cheating on her boyfriend Corey with his friend, but he forgave her. Does she need to know who fathered her baby? Then, Liz and Bailey have bonded over Josh fathering their kids!

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women … 4 Babies … Is He the Father?
programme.desc: We have more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Raymisha and Tianca both have children by a guy named Robert. But Robert is denying that he is the father! These women want him to step up to the plate! Later, Ashley made one mistake and now she fears that her family will be torn apart forever!

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Encontrar al sospechoso
programme.desc: Los atentados con bombas son difíciles de resolver, porque el perpetrador no suele estar en la escena y la evidencia se esfuma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era querida y exitosa, lo cual hace que la brutalidad del crimen sea más difícil de entender.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After saying goodbye to one of their own, reality sets in for the remaining training camp candidates: nobody's position on the squad is secure. The girls are fitted for the revealing DCC uniforms, then sweat their way through a punishing physical workout

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Indonesia
programme.desc: On Indonesia's eastern frontier lies an ancient world forged by fire. Isolated for thousands of years it is a land of extremes where creatures have evolved beyond recognition.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Indonesia
programme.desc: Central Indonesia is a wild, volcanic world. Trapped in the heart of the monsoon, rains have created a paradise and driven the evolution of rich and bountiful life.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: Zanzibar is a land of giants. Isolated from mainland Africa these islands harbour some of the most unique animals with many being the largest found anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: The Caribbean is famous for being a tropical paradise…but it also has a wild and unfamiliar side. Forged by volcanoes and shaped by hurricanes, the islands are unique and the wildlife that inhabits them is as surprising, as it is spectacular.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: Vancouver Island is home to one of the world's most diverse ecosystems. It's unique climate and geomorphology plays host to a wilderness like no other.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: This wild and windswept archipelago provides the annual breeding sites for millions of aquatic birds and marine mammals, as well as rich feeding grounds for the predators which hunt them.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Madagascar
programme.desc: Millions of years ago, hundreds of castaway creatures crash-landed on Madagascar's rugged shores. Isolated from the mainland, evolution went into overdrive. Of almost a quarter of a million species found on the island are unique.

programme.title: CLYDESDALE: SAVING THE GREATEST HORSE
programme.desc: The Clydesdale horse - famed for its white-feathered feet and for hauling Budweiser beer – is in danger of dying out.

programme.title: Coral Reef Adventure
programme.desc: Coral Reef Adventure follows the real-life expedition of ocean explorers and underwater filmmakers Howard and Michele Hall. The Halls guide us to the islands and sun-drenched waters of the South Pacific to document the health and beauty of coral reefs.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: The dry forest, which once covered the entire Pacific coast of Central America, now exists only as isolated "vestiges". In Costa Rica, however, it has been revived and even expanded thanks to the efforts of biologists and the local population.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: From the Corcovado National Park, described by National Geographic as "the most biodiverse site on the planet", researchers and conservationists follow the so-called "green corridors" in search of key species.

programme.title: Eagles: Kings Of The Skies
programme.desc: Whether in Alaska or in the Dolomites, eagles are generally seen as Kings of the skies. This film devotes itself on the one hand to the bald eagle, the heraldic bird of the United States and on the other, the Golden Eagle, Europe's largest predatory bird.

programme.title: Mind Of A Giant
programme.desc: Mind Of A Giant explores what it is like to be an elephant, as revealed by revolutionary new research, much of which has been conducted especially for this program.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Nine and King work to take Rigo's music to the next level; Rigo's connections to the street scene continue to weigh on his music and his relationship with Poppy.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Dancers are unable to let go during an erotic dance and Sage demands that they go out in search of their sensuality; things heat up between Dondre and Poppy; Sage and Rigo compete.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: As Nine encourages Sage to moderate his ambitions, Collette takes him on a journey into the past, to rediscover his artistic origins; Odalie finds it difficult to find balance in her love life and dance; Zo takes Tal out to have fun a night.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tal discovers a terrible family secret; Sage and the dancers develop a new and risky concept; Nine helps Rigo deal with his feelings for Poppy, while Poppy and Dondre confront their own feelings for each other.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Odalie tries to overcome an injury and preserve her place on the tour; Tal tries to relieve the guilt she feels and deserve Odalie's forgiveness; Rigo finds it difficult to maintain peace among his friends and find out who to trust.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: With Rigo's music about to go viral, Poppy is left with no choice but to respond; Collette takes control of the tour while Sage is away; Davis helps Uncle Al outside of work.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Tension mounts as the money bubble approaches in Monte Carlo's Main Event. With 159 players set to cash for at least €8,690, every decision matters. EPT legends Patrik Antonius and Davidi Kitai command the feature table.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The money bubble has burst, but for seasoned pro Ole Schemion-who has earned over $5 million in Monte Carlo alone-a minimum cash isn't enough. He faces a formidable challenge from French star Gaëlle Baumann and online legend Jussi Nevanlinna.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: PSPC champion Ramon Colillas surges into the top five as just 40 players remain in the EPT Monte Carlo Main Event. Day 3 intensifies as competitors battle to reach the final two tables.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The field narrows to just 16 survivors, including EPT Dublin champion Niall Farrell and PSPC winner Ramon Colillas. With over €41,000 already locked up, the stakes couldn't be higher as players fight for their place at the final table of nine.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Nine players remain, but only six will advance to the final day with a shot at nearly €1 million and poker immortality. Can PSPC champion Ramon Colillas extend his remarkable run to another major final table, or will his epic journey end?

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The moment of truth arrives at the EPT Monte Carlo final table. Six players-two businessmen, one qualifier, and three seasoned professionals-wage the ultimate battle for almost €1 million and the coveted EPT trophy.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet
programme.desc: The AO plan on sneaking into AAAnimus and rescuing their Bakugan. The AO team up with Benton Dusk to recapture their stolen Bakugan and free the energy from the Mind Core Cell.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet
programme.desc: The AO travel to a remote island in search of a Core Cell. The AO discover a small group of kids and Bakugan being used as laborers against their will.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.desc: While stranded in the jungle during a massive storm, Claire and Simon unknowingly stumble upon a clue to the whereabouts of the treasure sought by Sinjin.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Final Game

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Elements of Betrayal

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake se acostó con el prometido de su hermano Joe. Después, Danny dice que dejará a su prometida Heather por una dama de compañía profesional llamada Chelsi. Además, hay más historias de matrimonios disparatados.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carlton ha venido a revelarle a su novia que lleva una doble vida gay. Además, Tom Bergeron de "Bailando con las Estrellas" de la TV hará de juez famoso en un concurso de baile. Luego, Crystal le revela a su marido, Bobby, su infidelidad.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Khloe está dispuesta a contarle a Jamal que quizá no sea la mujer que él cree que es. Nick ha venido a confrontar a su esposa Barbara y al hombre con el que se ha estado acostando, Jason.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En este episodio especial, un grupo de espectadores selectos se enfrentará a algunos de los más memorables invitados de Jerry.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Johnny quiere que su novia Aimee lo acepte como es. Después, Maya viene al programa para confrontar a su novio Eric sobre sus costumbres.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nikki revela sus aventuras fraternales secretas, pero ¿podrá Joe perdonarla? Después, "Six O'Clock" confiesa que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su amiga Carisa por dinero.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Je'nier tiene un secreto difícil de contar a Preston. Después, ¡son Nikki y Nikky las que persiguen al mismo hombre! ¿Ganará Nikki o Nikky el corazón de Kevin? ¿Kevin merece el amor de alguna de las dos mujeres?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En el Show de Jerry Springer de hoy, una batalla de novias. Nicole le da un ultimátum a su amante: o la dejas o me pierdes. ¡Jerry ve cómo saltan chispas en el programa de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Es la batalla de los ex! Tony lucha para recuperar a su ex-amante. Richard le cuenta a su esposa que ha tenido un romance y ve a Lisa, su ex-amante, luchar por recuperarlo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Tensions run high when a slave-owning Celestial Dragon washes up on Fish-Man Island. His former captives cry for out for blood, but Queen Otohime sees it as a chance to mend fences between the gilled and non-gilled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After an agonizing absence, Queen Otohime returns to her people with exciting news. Unfortunately, a horrific act of violence derails the queen's mission and changes life on Fish-Man Island forever.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei reaches the heartbreaking conclusion in the story of Queen Otohime, Nami does something completely unexpected, and Hordy Jones makes a foreboding appearance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy announces his sinister plans for Fish-Man Island. Luffy and Shirahoshi are ready to fight, but Jimbei wants to wage this war on his own!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Jimbei come to blows over how to handle Hordy's uprising. Back at the palace, Brook embarks on an out-of-body experience with hopes of saving his mates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei and Luffy continue their standoff, the New Fish-Man pirates go on a rampage, and Hordy begins to experience startling side effects from his pill-popping habit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy's rampant use of the energy steroid makes him bigger, stronger, and scarier than ever before! The Fish-Man princes join the battle, but even they may not be strong enough to stop Hordy's onslaught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei and Shirahoshi are captured by the enemy, and Hordy makes a shocking revelation to the population of Fish-Man Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi reveals that she knew the truth about her mother's murder all along, and Luffy makes a bone-crushing entrance when the princess needs him most!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy announces his plan for turning humans into slaves, the people of Fish-Man Island throw their support behind a new champion, and Luffy amazes even his own friends!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang show off how much stronger they've become by issuing a brutal beat down to Hordy and his ferocious Fish-Man Pirates! Can anything stop the Hats?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy's men keep attacking, but the Straw Hats have new weapons at their disposal! Franky unleashes the fury of the Black Rhino, and Luffy turns the tables on Hordy with a little help from his Kraken!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky dazzles Usopp and Chopper by transforming into a gigantic fighting robot, Hordy tries to blackmail the Kraken, and Luffy introduces his fist to the Fish-man's face!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy shows off even more new powers as he brutally pummels Hordy, but the main attraction proves to be an ancient and immense pirate ship that's heading straight for Fish-Man Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi summons the courage to risk everything to save her world, Luffy puts his own life in peril by venturing into the ocean, and Hordy's devious nature fully comes to the surface.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets the stage for a final battle with Hordy, Sanji kicks a giant in defense of Nami's honor, and Zoro puts his blades to the ultimate test against a steroid-powered fighting fish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy and Shirahoshi try to prevent Fish-Man Island from being crushed, the rest of the Straw Hats square off against the meanest Fish-Man Pirates in the deep blue sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is the only one who can stop Hordy, but he'll need air to survive the fight, so Shirahoshi's big brother risks his own life in a heroic attempt to get Luffy a bigger bubble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the rest of the Straw Hats continue to fight bravely, Luffy tries to find a way to save the island, and the horrible truth about Hordy's hatred for humans is finally revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy's twisted past takes center stage in a Fish-Man flashback. Meanwhile, Shirahoshi's brother begs Luffy to save his beloved homeland and wipe out the anti-human element!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's fist of fire puts Hordy down for the count, and the rest of the Straw Hats try to make short work of the remaining Fish-Man Pirates. Meanwhile, a very big boat looms overhead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the rest of the Straw Hats try to make short work of their enemies, Luffy summons the strength for one last brutal attack on Hordy. Now, about that giant boat…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After defeating Hordy, Luffy turns his attention to stopping the Noah from crushing Fish-Man Island. Straw Hats and Fish-Men alike watch as Luffy tries to obliterate a boat with a barrage of brutal blows!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fish-Man Island was saved by the timely arrival of the Sea Kings, but all is not well. Luffy lost a lot of blood in his battle with Hordy, and fish-to-human transfusions are strictly forbidden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei must decide whether or not to join the Straw Hats, and the grateful citizens of Fish-Man Island host a fabulous banquet in honor of their human heroes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew learn of epic battle between Aokiji and Akainu, a forgotten foe tries to kidnap the mermaid princess, and Hordy's gang finally gets what's coming to them!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji stumble upon a couple of Big Mam's henchmen extorting sweets from the peaceful people of Fish-Man Island, the Straw Hats make a new – and very powerful – enemy!

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash wakes up in an asylum and a seemingly helpful doctor tries desperately to get him to admit his horrific acts so his healing can begin.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby, Kelly and Pablo go to look for Ash and Baal in an abandoned asylum and encounter some crazy characters.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, distraught about losing Pablo, is determined to bring him back!

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Ruby and Kelly battle the past to get to a future where Pablo is alive and the world is safe from evil, but the family from hell has other plans!

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash has gone from zero to hero in Elk Grove! With evil defeated and humanity saved, there was only one thing left to do: open a hardware store. His peace is short lived when evil returns with a new target close to his heart.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and Kate head to Mumbai, India in order to investigate a murder. Things get worse when Will falls ill and disappears.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and Kate head to Mumbai, India in order to investigate a murder. Things get worse when Will falls ill and disappears.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Two ships are wrecked and a tidal wave races toward the coast of Mumbai, India, following Wexford's attempt to kill \\"Big Bertha.\\" When Wexford tries to kill the creature again, Magnus risks her life to intervene in the Season 3 premiere.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will suffers from amnesia after his near-death experience; visitors are intent on finding out what is in his memory.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval (Von Flores) resurrects William Boone (Kevin Kilner) in an attempt to lure Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) into Howlyn's (Alan Van Sprang) trap.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) releases Dr. Mataros (Margot Kidder), a convicted serial killer, from death row in a desperate attempt to find a way to kill the Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) tries to sabotage Sandoval (Von Flores) and Howlyn's (Alan Van Sprang) plans for mass-producing Atavus regeneration chambers.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: William Boone (Kevin Kilner) faces an enemy from the past when Sandoval (Von Flores) brings Zo'or (Anita La Selva) back to life as an Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Love is both blind and deadly for J Street (Melinda Deines), who finds herself attracted to a seductive Atavus.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda answers a distress call when a cargo ship is attacked. Meanwhile, Trance is interrogated after paying a visit to the people.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Numerous women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash; detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders; the only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts Wichita, Kan., for decades by sending brazen letters and taking credit for horrific kills; at the introduction of the computer era, the killer gets sloppy and accidentally leaves a digital clue.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Louisiana is terrorized by multiple serial killers; the Zachary Police Department discovers the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware, but after investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After multiple men are discovered brutally murdered, investigators determine that each victim was last seen with a handsome stranger they met in a bar.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After a series of women in the Seattle area are found brutally murdered with their bodies posed, police realize that they might have a killer stalking the area nightclub scene who is able to charm his victims into submission.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police investigate the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago detectives believe that a serial killer is using classified ads to lure and murder his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer crisscrosses the Midwest leaving a string of victims along the interstate, but when he realizes investigators are hot on his trail the murderer suddenly changes his mark.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer conceals his victims' bodies with trash, discarding them like garbage in the back alleyways of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A Houston killer taunts the media and authorities as he uses homemade ligatures to murder his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: El Paso investigators race to track down a ruthless killer who is burying his victims in shallow desert graves, dead or alive.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chaos descends on Phoenix as two serial killers compete for the media's attention and the bodies pile up faster than the police can investigate.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Investigators in East Baton Rouge, La., hunt for a serial murderer who carefully carves up and cuts the bodies of his victims after death.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay. /When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to help Mayor Goodway bring it back!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station!/When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks!/The PAW Patrol must pick all Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase, and Rubble hatch a plan to help sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach!/There's a beached baby whale in Adventure Bay! Can the Paw Patrol work together to reunite it with its mother?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes?/Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the Adventure Bay Train Station, before the next train comes./Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock to fix the lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. /When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain./The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster - Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! /Mayor Goodway's purse chicken "Chickaletta" has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new "super trike"./Marshall proves he is a true hero when he stops to put out a real fire on the beach during a race against the clock for a trophy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day!/Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Capt'n Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a town party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea captained by a "ghost" Ryder and the Paw Patrol must save the ship and discover the ghost!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off - Ryder and the PAW PATROL have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Donkeys and Dollars

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Sweet and Sour

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Shoeshine Mike

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash meets a like-minded Trainer named Richie at the Pokémon League, the two boys quickly become close friends—and so do their two Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: While exploring a planet, the team is attacked and members are taken captive by an alien creature. The team must turn to Varro and his Lucian team for help. Meanwhile, on Destiny, Eli and Brody mistakenly trap Brody in a cryogenic device.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Destiny discovers the survivors of an interplanetary expedition who claim their civilization, Novus, was founded two thousand years earlier by Destiny’s crew. Suddenly, they are attacked by the Drones who have discovered a way to track Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Returning the settlers to their home planet Novus, the Destiny crew discover the planet has been abandoned and is on the verge of seismic destruction. While pouring through an underground archive, the crew learns of the true origins of Novus.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c and Bra'tac believe the time is right to lead their people in an uprising against the Goa'uld. Their plan suffers a setback when an army of Replicators begins to systematically take control of Goa'uld ships and Jackson is taken prisoner.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Hidden in the ruined temple on Dakara is an Ancient weapon powerful enough to destroy the Replicators. Thanks to a timely warning, the team knows it. And thanks to Daniel's repressed Ancient knowledge, Replicator Carter knows it as well.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With a climactic battle behind them, the team turns towards personal matters. Unbeknownst to them, Anubis prepares one final attempt! Meanwhile, Jackson awakens in a way station between the living world and the world of beings that have ascended.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jackson receives documents that point to the location of a ZPM in ancient Egypt. Hoping that the energy source could be used to power Earth's defenses and open a wormhole to Atlantis, SG-1 uses an ancient time machine to travel back to 3000 B.C.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1's attempt to recover a ZPM from 3000 B.C. has altered the timeline, leading to a present where the Stargate was never discovered! The alternate-reality Carter and Jackson convince a reluctant O'Neill to take them on their first mission through.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Still bound together by the Jaffa bracelets, Daniel Jackson and Vala are transported to a galaxy populated by worshippers of a potentially threatening authority called the Ori. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Hombres armados custodian la hacienda de los Reyes día y noche. Carmela sigue su plan y finge un desmayo para que despidan a Dominga, por quien surge una guerra entre Martín y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: El odio de Julieta la está llevando a la locura, y en su sed de venganza contra Paula comienza a perder el juicio tratando de suplantarla. Juan se da cuenta de sus mentiras y, al rechazarla, provoca en ella una reacción violenta llena de rencor.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le tiende una trampa a José y le devuelve su chantaje con un video que desenmascara sus ambiciosas intenciones frente a sus hermanos. Paula le pide a Sofía que resguarde la evidencia. Beatriz organiza la despedida de soltera para Guadalupe.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Llega el día del matrimonio de Guadalupe y Gaspar, al que se espera que asista Eleuterio. Paula arriesga su amor por Juan para salvar a su madre de la cárcel, pero él empieza a sospechar que José está detrás del rechazo de la mujer que ama.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Julia es asesinada por orden de Antonia, quien hace creer que fue un suicidio y culpa a Gabriela de esta tragedia. Pese a las terribles torturas, el Tigre se niega a dar la ubicación del oro. Fernando escucha que Antonia trama eliminar a Gabriela.

programme.title: La patrona
